REMOVED FROM SHORT CAUSE TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY 5, 2014 IN DEPT. 502 - THE COURT ISSUES IT'S TENTATIVE DECISION: PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT, RULE 3.1590(C)(4), WITH THE EXCLUSION OF THE CONCLUSION SEC. III(D), ALL PROVISION WITHIN THIS TENTATIVE STATEMENT OF DECISION SHALL BE THE STATEMENT OF DECISION UNLESS, WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS AFTER ANNOUNCEMENT OR SERVICE OF THE TENTATIVE DECISION, ANY PARTY SPECIFIES CONTROVERTED ISSUES OR MAKES PROPOSALS NOT COVERED IN THE TENTATIVE DECISION. IF ANY PARTY SO SPECIFIES CONTROVERTED ISSUES OR MAKES A PROPOSAL, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANTS, SHALL PREPARE, SERVE, AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION. (AJR-502-RG)
